doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated in the future (March 2026), cites a nonexistent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (predating the EDPB's 2018 establishment), and adopts a position fundamentally contradicting GDPR Article 4(5) and Recital 26, which explicitly tr
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document is dated March 2026 (in the future), references a non-existent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (the EDPB was established in 2018), and its radical position that pseudonymized data falls outside GDPR material scope contradicts established GDPR recital 26 and Article 4(5), which explicitly state pseudonymized data remains personal data; the formatting, numbering scheme, and legal reasoning are inconsistent with real EDPB guidance documents.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated in the future (March 2026), cites a nonexistent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (predating the EDPB's 2018 establishment), and adopts a position fundamentally contradicting GDPR Article 4(5) and Recital 26, which explicitly treat pseudonymized data as personal data.
